calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2011 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2011 Continued To Oct-07-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-16-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

Andrew Weigel, Esq. appeared for plaintiff(s) Christopher J. Harney, Christina Harney, and Thomas F. Murphy and MArtina Murphy as Settlers and Trustees of the Murphy Trust UTD dated October 3, 2003,

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).
Plaintiff's witness Tom Murphy, sworn and examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) Pierre Leduc, an individual for a Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $99,075.08
Prejudgment Interest - $32,450.28
Attorney's Fees - $3,721.00
Costs - $769.60
Total judgment in the amount of $136,015.96

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2011 Continued To Aug-26-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
